title: Define ConfigLoadError variants
scenario: A configuration loader can fail for different reasons. Start with an enum that keeps those reasons programmatic.
instructions: Define ConfigLoadError with MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead variants.

hints.body: Create a public enum named ConfigLoadError with three unit variants: MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead.
Derive Debug on the enum so the error type works with test output and later error implementations.
One complete solution for Define ConfigLoadError variants is shown below.

completionExplanation: ConfigLoadError now has programmatic variants for the three loader failure cases. Later lessons can attach formatting and source errors to this same enum.
